mapper.select: SELECT uc.id AS userCouponId, uc.status AS userCouponStatus, c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.name, c.type, c.discount_value AS discountValue, c.min_amount AS minAmount, c.total_count AS totalCount, c.used_count AS usedCount, c.start_time AS startTime, c.end_time AS endTime, c.is_lottery AS isLottery, uc.create_time AS createTime FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = #{status} ORDER BY uc.create_time DESC
